name: Forest Survivor Challenge
description: Survive the wild in Forest Survivor Challenge, the ultimate jungle survival adventure! After your plane crashes in the Amazon, you must explore dense forests, cut trees, gather resources, and reach marked points to stay alive. Face dangers like wild animals, harsh weather, and unpredictable terrain while crafting tools and shelters to survive. Hunt, strategize, and test your instincts in thrilling challenges. Can you endure the wilderness and conquer the forest? Adventure, action, and survival await in this intense, realistic forest journey!
instructions: Use keyboard controls WASD Keys Movement W - Forward A - Left S - Backward D - Right K Key Attack E Key Change Camera E For Change Camera
